programme.title: The Battle: Roar To Victory

programme.title: Kate Winslet: Leading Lady
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Kate Winslet, known for Titanic, is celebrated for her versatile, intense performances in both Hollywood blockbusters and indie films, cementing her as one of the finest actors of her generation.

programme.title: Gerrard: Born to Lead
programme.desc: In an illustrious professional career that spans over 20 years, Gerrard has experienced and succeeded at the pinnacle of the sport, lifting trophies as a player and manager, and representing his country. But with the highs, came the lows.

programme.title: Cristiano Ronaldo: The One and Only
programme.desc: Witness the journey from the young Portuguese prodigy to one of the greatest players of all time. This is the one and only...Cristiano Ronaldo.

programme.title: Armstrong
programme.desc: Dramatic, moving and insightful, Armstrong tells the definitive life story of Neil Armstrong - from his childhood in rural Ohio, through aerial combat in Korea, to his first steps on the Moon - and the unwanted celebrity status that ensued.

programme.title: Tom Hanks: The Nomad
programme.desc: From humble beginnings to an aspiring thespian to acting as some of the world’s most iconic and notable characters. He has picked up a reputation as ‘America’s Nice Guy’, ’The Everyman’ and a nomad of the arts. But we all know him… as Tom Hanks.

programme.title: Harrison Ford: Hollywood Hero
programme.desc: Everyone thinks they know Harrison Ford. They know the adventurous Nazi-fighting archaeologist and the Blade Runner from a dystopian future. But nobody really knows the man behind the movies once the cameras have stopped rolling.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Explore the Western Cape's stunning shorelines, dramatic mountains, and richly-diverse metropolis, from thousands of feet in the air.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Observe a land filled with geological phenomena whose majesty can only truly be appreciated from the sky. From forgotten shipwrecks strewn along the coastline to the unexplained fairy circles in Koakoveld, Namibia's secrets will be revealed.

programme.title: Carrie Underwood: Southern Grace
programme.desc: From a small-town farm in Checotah, Oklahoma, to the biggest stages in the world — Carrie Underwood’s journey is the story of a dream, a voice, and a fire that couldn’t be ignored. This is the story of Carrie Underwood — the all-American girl who became a living legend.

programme.title: Sting: Ever Evolving
programme.desc: Sting: Ever Evolving is an enthralling documentary that delves into the multifaceted life of one of music's most iconic figures. The documentary offers an unprecedented glimpse into the mind of a musical legend, showcasing how his art continues to inspire and challenge the world.

programme.title: Kate Winslet: Leading Lady
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Kate Winslet, known for Titanic, is celebrated for her versatile, intense performances in both Hollywood blockbusters and indie films, cementing her as one of the finest actors of her generation.

programme.title: Gerrard: Born to Lead
programme.desc: In an illustrious professional career that spans over 20 years, Gerrard has experienced and succeeded at the pinnacle of the sport, lifting trophies as a player and manager, and representing his country. But with the highs, came the lows.

programme.title: Cristiano Ronaldo: The One and Only
programme.desc: Witness the journey from the young Portuguese prodigy to one of the greatest players of all time. This is the one and only...Cristiano Ronaldo.

programme.title: Armstrong
programme.desc: Dramatic, moving and insightful, Armstrong tells the definitive life story of Neil Armstrong - from his childhood in rural Ohio, through aerial combat in Korea, to his first steps on the Moon - and the unwanted celebrity status that ensued.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: These animals live in the extremes but have created ingenious tools and techniques to cope with the harshest challenges to their continued survival.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: From birth life is filled with risk - and reward. To reach adulthood, animals must constantly overcome incredible obstacles. They must learn to find food, secure a home, attract a mate, and raise the next generation with only one thing on their mind - staying alive.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam Liaw arrives in his mum's home town of Beijing to begin a culinary, historical and personal journey through the ancient country of China.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam visits the beautiful, mountainous province of Anhui, home to one of the eight great regional cuisines of China. Anhui cuisine is hearty, peasant food that uses seasonal, wild produce from the mountains.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam's journey to explore China's history through its food continues, as he visits the provinces of Jiangsu and Zhejiang, both considered part of the 8 great regional cuisines of China and celebrated for their wealth and sophistication.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam Liaw arrives in one of the largest cities in the world Shanghai where he discovers a modern, cosmopolitan and global facing city.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: On his journey discovering China's history through its food, Adam arrives in Shandong - birthplace of Confucius and one of the oldest and most influential culinary traditions in China.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam Liaw arrives in one of the most fascinating Chinese provinces - Yunnan. Infused with spice and fragrance from Southeast and Central Asia, people from all around China have fallen in love with this cuisine and culture.

programme.title: Edge of Existence
programme.desc: Edge of Existence explores a future where bio-threats present one of the greatest existential risks that humanity has ever faced. From viruses to man-made pandemics and synthetic bio-weapons, technology is accelerating the risks of man-made threats.

programme.title: Edge of Existence
programme.desc: Edge of Existence explores a near-future where artificial intelligence rules the planet, and us. AI will arrive in our life-times bringing with it the biggest existential risk humanity has ever faced.

programme.title: Battle of Midway: The True Story
programme.desc: An inside look at the Battle of Midway, the aircraft used on both sides of the fight, and the dramatic story of one fighter pilot and his pivotal role in America’s first true victory of the Pacific War.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam meets a tea master, a Maiko, and a Michelin chef who turns risotto into sushi in the thriving traditional culture of Kyoto.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw explores Japan's high-energy financial centre, Osaka, and finds the world's best fast food, a sumo wrestler turned chef, and soba noodles to die for.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In Japan's southern islands of Kyushu and Shikoku, Adam Liaw finds a vibrant, warm culture where the cuisine is as fascinating as its people.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam ends his taste tour through Japan with a trip to the island of Okinawa, where he discovers an eclectic cuisine and learns the secret to long life.

programme.title: Evolving Vegan
programme.desc: Mena restaurant-hops with friends Lilly Singh and Laura Marano, indulging in plant-based French pastries, "pastrami" sammies, Thai "chicken" wings and "carne" asada.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: After helping George and Harold make a comic featuring the heroine Plungerina, Erica asserts that Plungerina could be better that Captain Underpants. To prove her wrong, the boys decide to actually create the villain in the comic and then have Captain Underpants save the day. Unfortunately, Krupp - and therefore Captain Underpants - is away at a principals' convention.There's no one to save them...until a real life Plungerina saves tthe day! But who is really Plungerina?

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: In an awesome chase/battle through the desert, the crew goes up against Rafaela, Matsuo, and Sandocal – who are driving the kids’ own cars. The crew struggles to fight back while also not losing the trail to Cleve’s base in the desert. When Rafaela turns on Sandocal, he and Layla decide to work together and manage to overpower Rafaela and Matsuo. Sandocal tells the kids to go to escape toward the Bedouin Shield.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: It’s revealed that Cleve is building a massive weather machine that is generating dangerous desert storms, with the help of a genius North African teen named Ziri. When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up. But after the storm clears, Tony challenges the brothers to a camel race in order to get their help tracking down Cleve – and he wins! Now the Bedouins have to take the kids to the Eye of the Sahara, a huge strange storm that they know has something to do with Cleve’s plot. Elsewhere in the Sahara, Ms. Nowhere and Gary are captured by Cleve.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With Morando and his Armada heading for Earth, Aja and Krel clash with Vex and Zadra over how to handle the situation. Vex and Zadra want to alert human authorities, while the Royal teens seek out a more creative solution -- video games.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The arrival of Tronos – a bounty hunter with the power to control electricity – sparks an investigation by Area 49-B that threatens to expose the Royals’ alien identities. Meanwhile, Mother watches as the Royals struggle to work together to deal with this new threat.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Colonel Kubritz issues a medical quarantine that locks down the high school, Aja and Krel must avoid capture with help from their friends. Meanwhile Vex, Zadra, and Stuart have a run-in with a familiar face.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Chet, Skidmark and Smoove Move bring swamp toad Marty on an adventure; The snails fumble taking care of a lost human child left at the taco stand.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: A mix-up puts the FAST crew on a rocket bound for outer space; The crew must work together to avoid space madness, debris ... and a fiery re-entry.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: Archibald accidentally ruins Bea’s plans by getting them both stuck in a giant unpoppable bubble. / Archibald invites a friend to the Strutter’s slumber party who’s kind of a downer. As the party goes south, Archibald helps his friend try new things to make it through the night.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: An overzealous librarian is after Archibald for an overdue library book. / Archibald volunteers to be the host of Cousin Ashley’s beloved family holiday. But when Ashley’s favorite cousin threatens to bail, Archibald works extra hard to make this the best holiday ever.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: The PALs make plans for the Valentine's Day dance, then pivot to scare off a group of raiders who've come to rob the headmaster's vault.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: When all the controls fail on the Castle Ship due to a virus, Pidge must step up to solve the problem before it's too late

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Bob wants to join LarryBoy's team of heroes, but keeps getting in the way/Tina starts a volunteer fire department with Bob and Larry.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Rooney the Olive Hound gets jealous when Ichabeezer finds a lost puppy and takes care of it. /Larry's jealous when his incredibly talented and accomplished cousin George visits.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids scare away a swarm of bees. But when they realize bees make the flowers happy, they hatch a plan to get them back! / When Scallop makes a bad choice, Kelp helps her learn from her mistakes.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and the rest of his friends put on a game of rainbow ball, but Kelp begins to wonder how well his special spark can help him truly measure up to his favorite player. / When the underwater friends meet someone new, they’re reminded that their differences make them unique.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: After Burple and Cutter crash-land in a village of tiny dragons, Burple's unintentional act of courage leads the locals to crown him as their king.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus's superpowered mechano-dragon threatens to replace the Riders. But when it spirals out of control, the town's real heroes have to step up!

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Marcus makes a Dew Drop-sized hot-air balloon for Phoebe and the Dews have a blast helping their kids from above, including secretly guiding Lola back to her family, before she accidentally follows Hip-Hop the frog out of the park. / Phoebe makes a pair of glasses for Bob the bird, but when seeing things clearly for the first time gets him lost, the Dews help Bob find his nest before his family arrives for a visit.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: In preparation for the big race to determine the next Race Cadets, Sam Whippet challenges the Not Yet Cadets to build their own cars. The catch? The car parts are scattered throughout Pawston. \ The Not Yet Cadets compete in the final race to see which team will join the Race Cadets.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag wants to do something special for her Mom and Paw’s anniversary, so she recreates the boat cruise where her parents first met. \ Tag discovers that nothing is planned for Pawston’s 100th birthday, so she decides the town needs to rebuild the old Bonestand for a big Pawston concert.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: With a little help from Gabby’s imagination, a sparkly toy banana turns into a magical Rainy Day Banana that helps Gabby and the Gabby Cats have fun on a rainy day! They have silly banana snacks with Cakey, make crafts to tell a story with Baby Box, and have an a-meow-zing banana dance party with DJ Catnip. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse is immersed in imaginative Wild West play with Sheriff Gabby, Sheriff Pandy, and CatRat the Bandit. programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelps learns about memory spark in an attempt to relive a memory of his grandmother. / Kelp and the underwater gang put on a show to showcase their imaginary sparks. As she practices, however, Scallop becomes convinced her tusk has a real spark!

programme.desc: Kelp is excited to celebrate his right of passage, breaking the ice with his horn. But when he struggles to break the ice like other narwhals, he is determined to do it “the Kelp way.”

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: The Return of Superman
programme.desc: Parenting challenges of "Superman" , the first hero that children encounter when they are born.

programme.title: Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number—attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Problem Child in House
programme.desc: A collection of outrageous problems that you have never heard of! A great 'knowledge talk show' where problematic children who are struggling and fighting in the emotional rooftop room gain true wisdom about life and the world.

programme.title: Stars' Top Recipe at Fun-Staurant
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: Music Bank
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Embark on the journey with two Thai artistes, Gun and Ticha, as they navigate the bustling city life and discover the serene outskirts of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Agent of Death
programme.desc: After undergoing a secret government experiment, CIA operative Tara gains the ability to shapeshift into anyone through DNA transformation, making her the ultimate infiltrator. When her father is murdered and evidence points to her own agency, she is forced to go rogue. Now, she must stop stolen uranium from triggering a global nuclear catastrophe.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: A former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily, leading to the team’s downfall. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team and unexpectedly shines in a real-life race, can the three drivers team up to regain glory for their team?

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares her favourite Sicilian dish, pasta con le sarde, or sardine pasta, using both canned fish and fresh sardines atop long-cut pasta.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: A busy Theresa is desperate to plan a girls' night with her besties. While at lunch, Spirit pulls Theresa into a reading that finds a departed mom asking her daughter's boyfriend for a proposal!

programme.title: Mama's Little Murderer
programme.desc: Devoted single mother Constance struggles to balance her newfound love with Leo and the obsessive, destructive behaviour of her son, Anthony, who will go to extreme lengths to keep her to himself.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Despite being from different parts of the world, Raquel and Samir first bonded over their shared love of the ocean. Now married, they are racing to find the perfect coastal home.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares her favourite Sicilian dish, pasta con le sarde, or sardine pasta, using both canned fish and fresh sardines atop long-cut pasta.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah brings a Filipino classic to life with her adobo baby back ribs and pancit noodles, each with a Southern twist and inspired by a chef in Atlanta. She marinates the ribs and pan-fries them.

programme.title: How She Caught A Killer
programme.desc: The Route 40 Killer targets sex workers with an unknown motive. Detective Linda Murphy goes undercover and gets entangled in a chilling cat-and-mouse game, reminiscent of The Silence of the Lambs.

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and Aubrey is rushing to Chicago for the birth of her sister's baby. Her plane is grounded in a snowstorm, leaving her stranded for the night at a small-town airport.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Despite being from different parts of the world, Raquel and Samir first bonded over their shared love of the ocean. Now married, they are racing to find the perfect coastal home.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares her favourite Sicilian dish, pasta con le sarde, or sardine pasta, using both canned fish and fresh sardines atop long-cut pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael makes a delicious pasta dish with a creamy pea sauce layered with fresh pecorino cheese, baby greens and sautéed Guanciale, an Italian salt-cured meat coated with sage and rosemary.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: After a demonstration from Michelin starred chef Vicky Cheng, three cooks must recreate his ‘Three Ages of Daikon Radish’ vegetarian dish, from memory alone, the winner claiming immunity.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Grab your map and your appetite as host Michael Yo sets his sights on the best off-road eats. Buckle up as we hit the backroads for bison burgers in Alabama and Brussels sprouts behind bars in Connecticut.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Dr. Lyndsey assists Dr. Lee with Lance's notoriously big bump, which halted his rap dreams. Shelby has lost control of her sweet tooth, her health and the mystery bumps she has developed.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S3)
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a classic pesto sauce using fresh basil, roasted pistachios and pine nuts, combined with pecorino and parmesan cheeses. She then cooks it "Lucca Style", with potatoes and green beans.

programme.title: Mama's Little Murderer
programme.desc: Devoted single mother Constance struggles to balance her newfound love with Leo and the obsessive, destructive behaviour of her son, Anthony, who will go to extreme lengths to keep her to himself.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: When web model Kara gets disturbing messages from a fan, influencer Cody comes to her aid. But when the stalker begins to show up in person, "IRL" takes on a whole new level of meaning for Kara.

programme.title: Got to Leave Something
programme.desc: South Korean actor Kim Nam-gil embarks on a journey with his companion, Lee Sang-yoon. Their first destination is the Punch Bowl village, a place marked by the pain of the divided Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: When Theresa headlines a fundraiser to fill the Wish Room at a local center for sick children, lives are changed forever. Channeling a young girl for her grieving mom, Theresa calls the woman's family.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Rebecca, Kristy and Roy have found their next potential flip: a lakefront property with a spicy past. Weather-beaten and dated, this former vacation home is definitely lacklustre.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: It’s the final cook in Hong Kong. The six cooks are split into teams, cooking street food in a traditional dai pai dong for 120 hungry locals to win immunity.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah takes the chicken and waffles to the next level with her duck schnitzel and sweet potato waffles. She marinates and fries the duck, then mixes baked sweet potatoes with egg, milk and spices.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: David made a promise to Camilla's mom that he would bring her home to the East Coast when they retired. Now they are back, looking for their forever home, close to family and with a great ocean view.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Author and chef Sara Moulton joins Rachael in her Tuscan kitchen for a cooking challenge. Both Rachael and Sara create mystery meals using ingredients from Rachael's Tuscan pantry.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: Following the trail of a cache of precious gemstones, Jeff and the team move further beyond the breakers, in search of The Neptune. With stormy weather closing in, a new find may lead them one step closer.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: Ronnie and Timmy chase a legendary gator that's been on the run for years. Willie Edwards and his son Little Willie head to an isolated body of water to chase a behemoth that's causing trouble.

programme.title: The UnBelievable with Dan Aykroyd (S1)
programme.desc: In Boston, a 25-foot tidal wave of...molasses? A dancing plague that kills 100 people? A surgery with a 300% mortality rate? We search the globe for the strangest and most bizarre deaths on record.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: After months of tireless work and focused research, the massive excavation to recover the fabled Chappell Vault begins.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified with David Duchovny (S1)
programme.desc: The underbelly of science has never lurked as prominently as when it was harnessed for state-sanctioned 'research'. In newly published records, discover Stalin's trials to create a hybrid human-ape army.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Marty desperately searches for a bull moose that vanished in thick brush; Mike hustles to pack out the meat from a bull elk before it can be scavenged by brown bears.

programme.title: Monkey Kung Fu
programme.desc: Wei Chun is a cocky young man sentenced to jail for killing a man in a fight. One day, Wei Chun picks a fight with a seemingly defenseless old man who completely thrashes him! The old man turns out to be the master of monkey style kung fu and as they become friends, he gives Wei Chun half of a medallion that would direct him to hidden secrets.

programme.title: 3AM - The Office
programme.desc: The Hungry Ghost Festival is around the corner. A newcomer at a workplace offends the ghosts in his office building when he shows disrespect for the spirits on his first day at work. In the course of a night shift, the man and his colleagues working overtime experience spooky encounters that make them reflect on their behaviours and beliefs...

programme.title: Detective Dee's the Zombie Town
programme.desc: Detective Dee investigates a series of terrifying vampire transformations in Youming Town, uncovering a sinister conspiracy masterminded by Prince Li Zhen, who plots to overthrow the empire. Armed with courage and ingenuity, Dee defeats the bloodthirsty vampires and ultimately exposes the prince’s dark ambitions.

programme.title: Dragon Swamp
programme.desc: Fan is cheated by her lover Tong to steal her master’s Jade Dragon Sword. She is jailed in the Dragon Swamp as punishment and gave birth to a pair of twins - her daughter is raised by her master, while her son is taken by Tong. Twenty years later, the sword is stolen again and Fan’s daughter goes seeking for it, meeting Fan’s friend along the way.

programme.title: Young Vagabond
programme.desc: Su Can, the carefree yet unruly eldest son of a winery owner, is forced to study under a tutor after being expelled from school. He soon discovers that his tutor is a martial arts master and becomes his disciple. However, when his family and master are slain by the ruthless bandit, Centipede, Su Can embarks on a perilous quest for revenge.

programme.title: My School Mate, the Barbarian
programme.desc: Edward attends a new school which has a reputation for fighting. Student leader Stone, befriends Edward, but their friendship is tested when a local triad leader discovers that Edward comes from a wealthy family.

programme.title: Clan of the White Lotus
programme.desc: The head of White Lotus Clan, Lo, is a highly skilled martial artist who supports the Qing government and helps destroy the rebellion group. Hung from Shaolin who kills Lo’s brother, is being hunted and hides in another rebel Hu’s house. The clan attacks at night killing Hu and his sister, but Hung manages to get Hu’s pregnant wife to safety.

programme.title: King Eagle
programme.desc: A young swordman, King Eagle, unwillingly gets involved in the internal affairs of a powerful clan and becomes their target. He is saved by the female chief of the clan, Lin, and falls in love with her. However, Lin’s sister is part of all evil plots and betrays her. Even so, Lin begs King Eagle not to harm her sister.

programme.title: The Shadow Whip
programme.desc: Three hundred thousand worth of silver is robbed by a thief using a whip as the weapon. As it is a signature weapon used by a martial arts master “Shadow Whip”, he is suspected and hunted. No one sees him after that. Fifteen years later, a young girl Yang shows up using the same weapon. Who is this girl and what has happened to “Shadow Whip”?

programme.title: Swordsman and Enchantress
programme.desc: The story happens in a martial arts world where everyone tries to obtain the "Deer Sword". Lian's wife is wounded in an ambush and his rival Xiao saves her. They escape to Xiao’s home and he treats her poisonous wound. This leads Lian to suspect his wife’s faithfulness and results in several blood-splattering duels with Xiao.

programme.title: Shinjuku Incident
programme.desc: Illegal Chinese immigrant Steelhead and his comrades strive for survival in Tokyo, eventually forming a triad gang with Yakuza leader Eguchi in Shinjuku. Steelhead plans to retire after becoming a citizen, but when the police cracks down on the gang and with Eguchi planning to kill him, he is forced to return to the triad underworld.

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then…

programme.title: Ode to Gallantry
programme.desc: In this surprisingly light-hearted "Venoms" martial arts adventure, a lone wanderer is repeatedly mistaken for someone else and drawn into a number of violent battles.

programme.title: Legend of the Fox
programme.desc: A young man, Chin, believes he is an orphan, until he meets three men and learns from them that his father was a great swordsman who was killed when he was trying to dispel rumors of a wrongdoing and return a lost sword to its rightful owner. Chin seeks out the men’s help to take vengeance on the wrongful death of his father.

programme.title: The Rescue
programme.desc: An emergency occurs on an offshore drilling rig that would cause it to capsize and sink. The Emergency Response Unit races against the clock in a chopper rescue mission amidst dangerous explosions and fire. Captain Gao Qian must work seamlessly with his chopper pilot Zhao Cheng to rescue survivors using the most maverick and dangerous tactics.

programme.title: Ready O/R Knot
programme.desc: Guy and Heidi have been together for five years since they first met in a wedding banquet, but marriage soon becomes a challenge to their relationship. Heidi sees marriage as a testimony of their love, while Guy sees it as doomsday. Can the couple resolve their conflict? Are they ready or not?

programme.title: Pandoy... Alalay ng Panday
programme.desc: In Pandoy, Joey De Leon gave a comic twist to the popular "Panday," a fictional action hero popularized by the King himself, Fernando Poe, Jr.

programme.title: Pretty Boy
programme.desc: Andrew E times two doubles the fun in this comedy about mistaken identities and the hilarious results. Andrew played Pretty Boy, a well-known gangster who was dressed in designer suits.

programme.title: Sabado Nights
programme.desc: This is a tale of love and friendship among three young women, whose lives centered on what they do every Saturday night.

programme.title: The Maggie Dela Riva Story
programme.desc: Maggie Dela Riva was a popular young actress in 1969 when she was abducted and raped by four men from rich, influential families. Concerned about the rising number of crimes against women, Maggie came out of retirement to once more tell her story.

programme.title: Andrea, Paano ba ang Maging Isang Ina?
programme.desc: The true story of a law enforcer who did everything he could to uphold the law.

programme.title: Init sa Magdamag (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: This is a modern tale about woman. Her many moods. Her many faces. No matter who she was, happiness was not destined to be hers as all the events of her past eventually caught up with her.

programme.title: Laruan
programme.desc: Joy (Carmi Martin) has only one ambition in life--to get rich and give her family a more comfortable life. She enslaves herself to William (Mark Gil) in her hope that he will help her achieve her goal.

programme.title: Hanggang Ngayo'y Ika'y Minamahal
programme.desc: She loves her husband despite his irresponsible ways.She continues to stand by him despite his flaws.

programme.title: Amo
programme.desc: This action movie tackles the issue of labor union. Starring Rudy Fernandez as Leon delos Reyes.

programme.title: Extranghero
programme.desc: After causing a series of troubles in his hometown, Botong (Andrew E) leaves for Manila to look for his long-lost mother. But he ends up in a mental asylum where he meets the beautiful Kristy.

programme.title: Batangueno Kabitenyo
programme.desc: This is a story of Magno,who is from Batangas and has the ability to attract women like flies.He goes to Manila hoping to change.

programme.title: Boy Chico Hulihin... Ben Tumbling
programme.desc: This is another look at the brief and violent life of 60's hoodlum Ben Tumbling. This version is from the point of view of Boy Chico, the dedicated cop who killed him.

programme.title: Tootsie Wootsie (Ang Bandang Walang Atrasan)
programme.desc: Tom, Dick and Harry were falsely accused of killing a popular radio commentator and their girlfriends, Amy, Susie and Tessie were helping them prove their innocence.

programme.desc: When Winston won't play with Lydia, Daisy and Mr. Crocodile create an imaginary friend for her. // Mr. Crocodile helps Daisy fish-sit for Martin, but worries he won't be able to stop himself from eating it.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The pups jump into action to build an observatory to help their friend River get a cool picture of a shooting star! // After meeting Park Ranger Rose, the pups get stuck on a nature trail. But Rubble & Crew, finds a construction solution.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Construction on the first Builder Cove library is abuzz with bees! This calls for an extra sweet constuction solution. / Grandpa Gravel teaches Charger all his best moves for the big dance contest. But will a runaway disco ball cost them first place?

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When Mayor Goodway and the twins are late getting back from a snowshoeing, Jake and Everest call the Paw Patrol to search for them. // Water in the duck pond mysteriously drains out, it's up to the PAW Patrol find out what's happening!

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: While out ice fishing in the North Country, Mayors Goodway and Humdinger, along with Chickaletta, get stuck in an ice crevasse. // The Wingnuts' farm plays host to a rootin' tootin Game Show hosted by Cowgirl Beryl!

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 19
programme.desc: When Leonard and Sheldon are invited to speak at UC Berkeley, they take a detour to try to sneak on to George Lucas's Skywalker Ranch to meet one of their idols.

programme.title: Friends S7 22
programme.desc: Chandler confronts his estranged cross-dressing father (KATHLEEN TURNER). Rachel gets into trouble driving Monica's Porsche.

programme.title: Superman & Lois S4 1
programme.desc: Superman is locked in a brutal battle with Luthor’s monster; Lois and the boys race against time to save General Lane.

programme.title: The Losers
programme.desc: An explosive tale of double cross and revenge, "The Losers" centers upon the members of an elite U.S. Special Forces unit sent into the Bolivian jungle on a search and destroy mission. The team--Clay, Jensen, Roque, Pooch and Cougar --find themselves the target of a lethal betrayal instigated from inside by a powerful enemy known only as Max. Presumed dead, the group makes plans to even the score when they're joined by the mysterious Aisha, a beautiful operative with her own agenda. Working together, they must remain deep undercover while tracking the heavily-guarded Max, a ruthless man bent on embroiling the world in a new high-tech global war.

programme.title: The Little Things
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this psychological thriller following two cops, one haunted by echoes of his past, investigating a series of murders.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 8
programme.desc: Michael mystifies laundromat patrons by impossibly multiplying miniscule amounts of detergent, and makes one man's day when he convinces him that he's hit the coin machine jackpot. Then at a thrift store, Michael taps into his musical abilities by turning into a human record player. Plus, as an employee at a shipping store, he astonishingly flips a full bowl of punch without spilling a drop and repeatedly teleports a glass penguin to one customer's dismay.

programme.title: Superman & Lois S4 1
programme.desc: Superman is locked in a brutal battle with Luthor’s monster; Lois and the boys race against time to save General Lane.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 15
programme.desc: Jane and Rigsby race to save Van Pelt from the killer who is hunting former CBI members, but it will take all of Jane's skills to locate her before it's too late.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 6
programme.desc: Minds are blown when two of our buyers team up for a major score. It's an unlikely pair that, together, could make a pile of cash. Plus, Jesse takes a big gamble on some African art and sweats it out hard when the authenticity is questioned. And later, the day's final auction reveals contents so shocking our buyers may be shut out of this game completely.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 7
programme.desc: Brandon and Jesse lock horns in a do or die bidding war. One of them spies an authentic treasure hidden amongst the contents, but only one will walk away with the score. And later, a newbie steals a prize unit out from under our regulars and proves that she's here to play. Then, Brandon and Lori unearth a five-alarm find. If it works, they could be looking at a $20,000 pay day on this item alone.

programme.title: ER S1 13
programme.desc: Benton is called out of surgery to find his senile mother. Kayson formally charges Lewis with negligence in the death of a patient. Carter is forced to help Benton's new intern.

programme.title: Superman & Lois S4 1
programme.desc: Superman is locked in a brutal battle with Luthor’s monster; Lois and the boys race against time to save General Lane.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S5 7
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells. And there's no happily-ever-after for tonight's big loser when his storybook ending becomes a humiliating sob story.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 9
programme.desc: Michael confuses wine drinkers with an incredible shrinking bottle, and a supposedly deep cork that defies the laws of physics. Then, he bedazzles a jewelry store patron with disappearing diamonds. Later, he heads to the carwash where one woman takesa stand when her "go green" clean takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 10
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro is a magician by trade, but a prankster by heart. In The Carbonaro Effect, Michael performs baffling tricks on unsuspecting people in everyday situations, all caught on hidden camera.

programme.title: Superman & Lois S4 2
programme.desc: Lana and Sarah join the fight against Luthor, who starts making moves in Smallville. Jordan and Jonathan butt heads over an important decision.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 16
programme.desc: Jane enlists his colleagues in a dangerous ruse to trap a team of art thieves. Meanwhile, sparks fly between Lisbon and an agent from the FBI's art squad.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 8
programme.desc: Our buyers bid big to win a locker packed with what looks like rare art, but will the winner walk away with cash or counterfeits? Then, a dumpy unit sends almost everyone running, but Papa Bear spies a profit. And later, the day's final auction contains expensive looking sky-diving equipment that ignites a sky-high bidding war. But when the dust settles, the winner will unveil a hidden gem that spells a five-figure payday.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 9
programme.desc: Our buyers go head-to-head to score an item that appears to be a covered car. But when the tarp is pulled back, will the winner drive away with a pile of cash or a piece of trash? Then, the legality of a locker's contents is called into question, but Brandon and Lori take a leap of faith and are rattled by what they find. And later, Sean has saved the best for last as our buyers are given the rare opportunity to compete for unclaimed airline luggage. It's an auction of a different breed that ignites a cash spending frenzy.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 9
programme.desc: Michael confuses wine drinkers with an incredible shrinking bottle, and a supposedly deep cork that defies the laws of physics. Then, he bedazzles a jewelry store patron with disappearing diamonds. Later, he heads to the carwash where one woman takesa stand when her "go green" clean takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 10
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro is a magician by trade, but a prankster by heart. In The Carbonaro Effect, Michael performs baffling tricks on unsuspecting people in everyday situations, all caught on hidden camera.

programme.title: ER S1 14
programme.desc: Lewis goes before the review board when a hostile attending doctor holds her responsible for a patient's death.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 11
programme.desc: When Will becomes the superstar of Carlton's high school basketball team, his success goes to his head.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S5 8
programme.desc: The Impractical Jokers, Sal, Joe, Murr and Q meet after the show to talk about their favorite moments during the show not to mention the most uncomfortable, most embarrassing, most humiliating and most outrageous. It is a chance for the viewers to hear about all the behind the scenes mishaps and awkward scenes as well as see outtakes never seen before.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 16
programme.desc: Jane enlists his colleagues in a dangerous ruse to trap a team of art thieves. Meanwhile, sparks fly between Lisbon and an agent from the FBI's art squad.

programme.desc: It's an underwater sing-along! Sing about five little sharks jumping on the bed & an underwater spider!

programme.title: Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: It's a day of clever fixes! The Sharksons fix a broken backpack & make a night light to help Grub sleep!

programme.title: So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: So many fun things to discover! The kids play Jack & Jill, have a tea party & make a big puddle splash!

programme.title: Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: It's time for sweet dreams! Mia learns calming yoga poses & Daddy shows her the "brush your teeth dance"!

programme.title: A Fun School Day with JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: It's a fun school day with JJ! He learns the alphabet with blocks & sings about the five senses!

programme.title: Messy Mayhem in the Clubhouse!
programme.desc: It's messy mayhem in the clubhouse! A slime volcano erupts & a magic mirror makes lots of colorful Bobas!

programme.title: My Hero, A Story, A Teddy & Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods learn big lessons! Bubbles becomes Lulu's hero & Fuse is encouraged to eat his healthy greens!

programme.title: Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!
programme.desc: The Minibods have unexpected problems! Jeff meets a messy guest & Lulu finds a mysterious egg that cracks!

programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Media Watch - Episode 16
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: Stuff the British Stole - Irish Giant
programme.desc: Marc Fennell unpicks the twisting history of Charles Byrne, the Irish Giant. It is a story of betrayal, exploitation, and the brutal reality of the medical industry.

programme.title: Larapinta - Episode 6
programme.desc: Talia nears the end of her journey at Kati Thanda (Lake Eyre), and reflects on what she has learnt. Above all, Talia questions what role she has in creating a better future for the Larapinta River for all Australians. (Final)

programme.title: Through Time
programme.desc: In search of her grandfather’s secret life as a Force 136 operative, Xin En turns to LiDAR technology to uncover what history has hidden. Each discovery reveals espionage, sacrifice and blurred morality.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.

programme.title: Red Snow
programme.desc: Olivia, an outstanding vampire romance novelist, longs to encounter a real vampire. Her wish comes true when Luke turns up at her remote snowbound cabin seeking for help. However, her dream transforms into a chilling nightmare on Christmas Eve when Luke's vampire companions track him down...

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: Three KOLs set out to live‑stream their trip to a remote island, but are deceived by a mysterious old woman who traps them there, intent on finding brides for her disabled grandsons. As they are captured, they must race against time to escape.

programme.title: Room For Rent
programme.desc: Lonely widow Joyce rents out a room in her house and becomes dangerously obsessed with a younger guest. Desperate for love, she is willing to eliminate anyone hindering her pursuit of happiness, and a chilling tale of obsession unfolds.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory in an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help other coworkers leave safely and fight to kill the monster!

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...

programme.title: Temps Present
programme.desc: 'Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Des Racines Et Des Ailes
programme.desc: Train of legend, the Venice Simplon-Orient-Express, runs from Venice to Paris. After more than a century of service, the inlaid wood interiors have been preserved thanks to the exceptional skills of the craftsmen of Auvergne. A journey through the land of volcanoes, where tradition and expertise are still handed down.

programme.title: Destination Francophonie
programme.desc: A journey throughout the French-speaking world to explore every corner of the globe! In each country we meet francophones who present, in French, their culture, way of life and commitments. The programme also shines a spotlight on local projects that keep the French language alive, dynamic and constantly evolving.

programme.title: Green
programme.desc: We head to the heart of French Guiana, a territory where 97% of the land is covered by Amazonian forest. Antoine Auriol meets Philippe Lova Jah, Elvis, Mariana, Anais, Dave and Francisco, working to protect this natural treasure, and discovers the Kaw marshlands, veritable refuge for biodiversity.

programme.title: Alterrenative Voyages
programme.desc: We head to the port of Fribourg before meeting a young couple of cheesemakers who produce Alpine gruyere and then visiting Estavayer-le-Lac and its biodiversity reserve, source of green energy.

programme.title: Capitaine Marleau
programme.desc: While investigating Lily's troubled past after she is found poisoned, Marleau quickly directs her suspicions toward Frederic Lefranc. The actor and director had sent several love letters to the young woman. From the theatre stage to the crime scene, the line becomes blurred.

programme.title: Basique, Les Sessions
programme.desc: Young artistes, each from a universe that's as rich as it is diverse, talk about themselves, their careers, their music, their influences...

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. programme.desc: The Ninja Turtles are on the run and...alone. Leonardo is a leader but who is he without anyone to lead? Leo now has to stop Bishop and her Mechazoids while trying to save his brothers.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: To save his brothers, Mikey needs the help of Bishop's intern, ROD. But Rod wants something in return... to be turned into a MUTANT! To save the day, Mikey has to become... RESPONSIBLE.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob finds a nasty sea urchin living in the Krusty Krab, and tries everything to force it out. // After getting his groceries stolen, Squidward convinces SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: An imprisoned Plankton teams up with his fellow inmates to break out of jail and steal the Krabby Patty secret formula. // SpongeBob replaces his broken spatula with one from Plankton, which may or may not have magical powers.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester go on a mission to find out what gives their favourite cereal "Tenta-Flakes" such a purply taste. // Bester's outlandish ideas to make mini golf fun for the customers nearly lead to disaster, but Best saves the day.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best's sound effects threaten to derail Bester's one chance to shine on the opening night of a Flip Flop's play. // Best and Bester's "inbestigation" into some missing golf balls escalates into a full-blown mountain rescue mission.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob work at the movie theater to watch a new premiere. // With Sandy's guidance, Patrick hosts a science show.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick presents a show about food after missing out on a hearty breakfast. // Patrick and SpongeBob experience the wonders of the workforce.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy's homemade snack becomes a big hit at the Krusty Krab. // SpongeBob and Patrick's favorite comedy duo has a falling out on live television.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head when he volunteers to babysit Sandy's 3 nieces.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: After a training accident causes a glitch in Chloe's powers, Max and Phoebe look for a cure. After Max thinks he's solved the issue, he allows Chloe to attend a party with friends, but his treatment creates brand new powers Chloe can't control.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Henry Hart's back and stealing Ray's attention from crime fighting so Danger Force is forced to go on a bunch of exhausting missions without Captain Man. But the mood dims when a scary Bounty Hunter from Dystopia comes to Swellview looking for Henry.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Jasper’s enthusiasm in crime fighting leads him to send Captain Man and Kid Danger into incidents that are not crimes. So when he is falsely accused of a burglary and sent to jail, Henry and Ray must find a way to set him free.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Mom and the twins win a raffle to spend a weekend at a resort, Lana struggles to leave her pets behind. // After Lincoln tests a magic trick on Grouse, they get handcuffed together and Grouse has to spend the day at middle school.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The Loud kids help Flip clean up his image to impress his middle school crush. // When the Mortician's Club can't afford tickets to Casket Con, they decide to start a business to raise money.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Realizing Mr. Coconuts is missing, Luan rallies the Louds to track him down along Route 66.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The long-lost episode of Mermaid Man is finally showing on TV, but will SpongeBob make it home in time to watch? // Karen gets a computer virus, and it's up to SpongeBob to get it out of her!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his old pal Bubble Buddy's hometown... Bubbletown! // Sandy invites Karen and Mrs. Puff out for a night on the town, so the ladies decide to blow off some steam.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mrs. Puff's new substitute teacher gives SpongeBob a crash course in driving.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick loses the remote in the cushions, so he journeys into the couch to track it down. // Patrick hosts a telethon to raise money for snails who can't dance.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: In this ad-packed variety episode, The Patrick Show sells merchandise in order to fund its second season.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: On Valentines Day, Rusty and his girlfriend, Amber, must hide their love when they realize their parents are business rivals. // When Lori sees a photo of Bobby with another woman on social media, she decides it's time to start dating again.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lola struggles to dampen her sweet tooth when mom challenges her to go an entire week without sugar. // Lincoln strives to impress the Amazing Brailster when he's chosen to be his assistant at the Illusion Chateau.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Tired of the yearly cheer surrounding her birthday, Lucy casts a spell so her family will forget what day it is. // When Zach is given detention, Rusty and the rest of their friends try to toughen up him up so he'll fit in.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Mom is assigned a travel article at work, she takes the entire family on a cross country road trip. But the trip gets off to a bumpy start when Lincoln tries to change Mom's itinerary to go to Dr. Weirdly's Bizarritorium.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Chuck's got a new hustle: theatre camp! Jack & Lil are sure it's a scam. But there's more to the chaotic show than they realized.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Now that Fred's leg has healed up, SpongeBob is determined to keep it out of harm's way...no matter what! // Patrick's lemonade stand isn't doing too well...until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs makes Spongebob and Squidward cook a fancy meal for Mrs. Puff, but every dish becomes a dispute.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Acu thinks a fish-loving alien is in town, and Mica offers to help him track it down.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: When Hope takes Gran Gran's special ladle to the park to play it ends up at Professor Lopez's archaeological dig.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lori and Bobby find a kitten, they decide to coparent and swap the kitten back and forth between their homes. // After telling her family how great her apartment is, Lori unknowingly entices her sisters to secretly take over her space.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Mom and the twins win a raffle to spend a weekend at a resort, Lana struggles to leave her pets behind. // After Lincoln tests a magic trick on Grouse, they get handcuffed together and Grouse has to spend the day at middle school.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde's David Steele movie turns high-stakes when Lisa builds a real nuclear reactor.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The Groom & Board gets a surprise inspection, but the broken pipe Jack and Lil neglected to fix might ruin them all. // Chuck's got a new hustle: theatre camp! Jack & Lil are sure it's a scam. But there's more to the chaotic show than they realized.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Max learns that Phoebe is working with Captain Perfect, and sets out to uncover the secret he is keeping. Chloe's crush invites her to a product launch party at Splat By The Sea, at the same time Jinx and Booch want her to protest outside the party.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Kid Danger and Captain Man attempt to capture Mob Boss Rob Moss by infiltrating his daughter's the sweet sixteen birthday party.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: Lay Lay and Sadie volunteer to build houses for those in need, but when Sadie is put in charge of all the workers, managing Lay Lay becomes her biggest challenge.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lana learns her favorite fish are in jeopardy of losing their home to construction she springs into action. // When Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde (as Ace and Jack) take on the case.

programme.title: Blue Jeans ep 11
programme.desc: BLUE JEANS is a youth-oriented drama that follows the intersecting and intertwining lives of 6 present-day Filipino working students in the university belt.

programme.title: Hapi House Season 2 ep 2
programme.desc: Auring (Candy Pangilinan) gets the Ha-Pi House back by buying it from Claudia (Giselle Sanchez) through the help of Andre (Fabio Ide). Since Claudia has lost everything, she applies as the maid of Auring. Auring once again opens the house to half-Pinoys and half-Pinays who are in need and together they become one big happy family.

programme.title: Totoy Bato ep 23
programme.desc: The series is based on the graphic novel created by Carlo J. Caparas. Totoy Bato, a young man, fighting for justice for his lost loved ones; also fighting for equality and fairness against his old friend turned nemesis Dwayne.

programme.title: Cuerpo Y Alma ep 6
programme.desc: Maya, a young nurse who has been having terrifying nightmares finds out a horrifying truth about a debt that was made to save her life when she was a child. As she's about to find out, the payment just may cost her much more than her life.

programme.title: Para sa Isa't Isa ep 13
programme.desc: Zion gets another shot at repairing his relationship with his wife, Erin by a wish on a well to go back in time. But he finds Erin not knowing him at all. He must now correct his mistakes and make her fall in love with him again.
